verses.text: God is 'jealous,' avenging, yet 'slow to anger, and great in power,' and 'will not at all acquit the wicked.' Justice and patience. God bears long, but He will not leave sin unpunished.
God is 'jealous,' avenging, yet 'slow to anger, and great in power,' and 'will not at all acquit the wicked.' Justice and patience. God bears long, but He will not leave sin unpunished.
God is 'jealous,' avenging, yet 'slow to anger, and great in power,' and 'will not at all acquit the wicked.' Justice and patience. God bears long, but He will not leave sin unpunished.
He dries the sea and rivers, the mountains quake; 'who can stand before his indignation?' Irresistible power. None can withstand the God whose fury is poured out like fire.
He dries the sea and rivers, the mountains quake; 'who can stand before his indignation?' Irresistible power. None can withstand the God whose fury is poured out like fire.
He dries the sea and rivers, the mountains quake; 'who can stand before his indignation?' Irresistible power. None can withstand the God whose fury is poured out like fire.

'The LORD is good, a strong hold in the day of trouble; and he knoweth them that trust in him'; but He makes an utter end of His foes. Refuge and ruin. The same God shelters the faithful and destroys the rebel.

'The LORD is good, a strong hold in the day of trouble; and he knoweth them that trust in him'; but He makes an utter end of His foes. Refuge and ruin. The same God shelters the faithful and destroys the rebel.
What do they imagine against the LORD? He will make a full end; 'affliction shall not rise up the second time.' Decisive judgment. God's reckoning with the wicked is complete.
What do they imagine against the LORD? He will make a full end; 'affliction shall not rise up the second time.' Decisive judgment. God's reckoning with the wicked is complete.
What do they imagine against the LORD? He will make a full end; 'affliction shall not rise up the second time.' Decisive judgment. God's reckoning with the wicked is complete.
Though the foe be many and strong, they shall be cut down; God will break their yoke from off His people. Deliverance. The oppressor's power is no match for God's purpose to free His own.
Though the foe be many and strong, they shall be cut down; God will break their yoke from off His people. Deliverance. The oppressor's power is no match for God's purpose to free His own.
God decrees the enemy's name be remembered no more; 'behold... the feet of him that bringeth good tidings.' Good news. The fall of the oppressor is gospel to the oppressed.
